## Description
Provide a clear description of the changes introduced by this Pull Request and the problem they solve.

## Architectural Checklist
- [ ] **Asynchronous Check:** Does this change run 100% asynchronously from the core telemetry/hardware loop?
- [ ] **Deterministic Calculations:** Have all ROI and smart contract state mutations been tested for strict determinism?
- [ ] **Compliance Alignment:** Does this modification comply with the core energy-core compliance architecture specifications?

## Testing & Validation
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated.
- [ ] Integration tests passed.
- [ ] Verified zero latency impact on simulated hardware runtime.
